corrections.location: first line of BODY, opening phrase
corrections.note: The body has a raised point/apostrophe-like stop after αἰῶνος, not a middle dot.
The image clearly includes ἐν at the end of the line before Ἱεροσολύμοις.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 5, after ℵca.
corrections.note: The apparatus reads πασα αι, not πασαι αι.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 5, variant after συναποστασαι εθυον
corrections.note: The printed apparatus has δαμαλει followed by comma, not abbreviated δαμαλ.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 6, witness after εν Ιερουσαλυμοις
corrections.note: The witness list clearly reads BabA.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 6, after B? mg sinistr.
corrections.note: The apparatus repeats the form πρωτοκουριας, not πρωτοκυριας.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 7, witness after του σιτου και του οινου
corrections.note: The apparatus includes mg after ℵc.a.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 7, variant after ελαιου
corrections.note: The second siglum is ℵ*ca, not δ*ca; the print is small but distinguishable.

corrections.location: app. line for verse 8, after τοις υιοις
corrections.note: Printed punctuation joins a.vid without space.

notes: Running head matches. Main body is otherwise accurate and includes the lower parallel text correctly. Apparatus mostly matches, with a few small misreadings and siglum issues.
